text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This whole Book of Secrets thing and the clues
that supposedly lead to Eden are a complete
mystery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They could just be someone's way of getting Gold
Ship motivated for races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the case, they're doing a great job of
getting her revved up.
choice_data_list:
(I should play into it and really maximize the
gains here!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's time to train for the next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...But Gold Ship isn't at the track. Looks like I
have to go on another wild goose chase for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk all over the academy, eventually ending up
on the roof of the school building.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's strange. We've had plenty of heated clashes
before...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: But I'm more irked today than ever, Nakayama...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: A little voice in my head is telling me I have to beat you no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: That I'll never find Eden if I don't surpass you first!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I don't know what this "Eden" crap is about,
but you've got my attention.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You want a challenge? Bring it on. The fiercer,
the better.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Good, then let's strike while the iron's hot and get
started right away!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Perfect timing, Trainer! You can be our witness!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The race is on! Try to keep up with my
afterimages, slowpoke!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two challengers take off, leaving me to race
after them as fast as my legs will carry me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Let's start things out spicy! A classic battle of who
can take the heat. Bring out the goods, El!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Order up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Two special sandwiches dripping with habanero
chili sauce! They're extra picante, just as
requested!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, this "sandwich" is completely red... It
looks like murder on toast!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, it wouldn't be much of a challenge
otherwise, would it? Now come on! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Ngh! This is no joke! My mouth is on fire!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Cough! But I finished the whole thing, so there! Cough!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! You both finished without a crumb left on
your plates! I call this a draw!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I feel like my face is melting off... But we're not
done yet! Ryan! You're up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing. Let's get some gains in! Your
challenge is to do a hundred sit-ups in one
minute! Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: A hundred sit-ups in a minute? Haha! You're on!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... What kind of unhinged challenges even are these?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... You keep complaining, but we both pulled it off... Wheeeze!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nicely done! That was exactly a hundred sit-ups!
It's a tie!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...It's packed here. You've really upped the scale
of whatever this contest is.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Our statue skills are gonna put the pro
mall mannequins to shame!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Our what?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, Bamboo! Live up to your title as head of
the discipline committee and keep an eye on us
all disciplinary-like!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You can count on me! My eyes are peeled for any
stray movements! Ready? Begin!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hey, are we seriously doing this?

text_block_list.name: Child
text_block_list.text: Mommy? What are those two doing?

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text: Shh! It's rude to stare!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Hey, aren't they from the academy?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Huh, they are. What're they doing? So weird...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Augh!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...Dammit, this is ridiculous! Why do I gotta put
up with this humiliation anyway?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, you moved. Sorry, Nakayama, but you're
out!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aww, yeah! I win, I win! Victory is mine!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You got me, Golshi! You dragged me right into
your court.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But ridiculous as your challenges were, a win's a
win! I'm not so petty as to argue that.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell you one thing, though—next time we clash,
it's gonna be on my turf, and I'm gonna crush you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You can try! Tell you what, I'll keep my fists
warmed up till then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship vs. Nakayama Festa: victory! (To be
continued...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the day-long Golshi Gauntlet
finally draws to a close.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whew, I'm burned clean outta energy. I'm so
burnt out, I'm practically charred carbon, like pot
stickers left on a hot stove overnight.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: That said, I beat the Nakayama. Surely that's good enough. Maybe I can even reach Eden now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, she's brought up Eden
quite a few times today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For someone who clean forgot about it before,
it's curious she's so gung ho all of a sudden.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's with the staring, huh? You that shocked
by how focused I can be when I got my eye on the
prize?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Guess I should let the cat outta the bag... But this
information's for your ears only, okay?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've been having some weird dreams recently.
Dreams where a mysterious voice tells me to go
to Eden and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's really throwing me for a loop is how
nostalgic the voice makes me feel...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It feels familiar like McQueen, but not as proper.
It's more casual, like Nakayama...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I know that voice like I know—well, almost like I know the smell of my gramps's tatami flooring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I expected to get another outlandish tall tale
from her, but what she tells me is shockingly
believable!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the same, the Book of Secrets is the thing that
started this whole quest for Eden.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is it possible whoever wrote it can also make
themselves appear in her dreams?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Anyhoo, I'm gonna head back. I'm gonna go at a
light all-out sprint, so try to keep up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I chase after Gold Ship, an odd feeling settling
heavily in my chest.
